title: Claude Code - Cost Deep Analysis
description: Event-level cost analysis -- per-request efficiency, speed mode comparison, model cost breakdown, user cost attribution. For aggregate cost totals and trends, see Real-Time Metrics.

links.title: Overview
links.tooltip: Executive summary with Prometheus + Athena highlights

links.title: Real-Time Metrics (Prometheus)
links.tooltip: Live cost totals, rates, trends -- switch here for aggregate views

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_id FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE team_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY team_id

list.name: user
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY user_display

panels.title: Avg Cost / Prompt
panels.description: Average cost per user prompt interaction. Green < $0.05, Yellow $0.05-$0.15, Red > $0.15.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(total_cost / NULLIF(prompt_count, 0), 4) AS avg_cost_per_prompt FROM (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) AS total_cost, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN 1 END) AS prompt_count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name IN ('claude_code.api_request', 'claude_code.user_prompt') AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*' OR model IS NULL))

panels.title: Avg Cost / API Call
panels.description: Average cost per individual API request. Green < $0.01, Yellow $0.01-$0.05, Red > $0.05.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*')

panels.title: Cost per 1K Output Tokens
panels.description: Effective cost per 1,000 output tokens. Green < $0.02, Yellow $0.02-$0.08, Red > $0.08.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(output_tokens), 0), 4) AS cost_per_1k_output FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*')

panels.title: Cache Efficiency
panels.description: Cache hit ratio showing what percentage of input tokens were served from cache. Higher is better.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)), 0), 1) AS cache_hit_pct FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*')

panels.title: Model Cost Comparison
panels.description: Total cost from Prometheus (stable), call details from Athena. Joined by model.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT model, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS api_calls, ROUND(CAST(SUM(input_tokens) AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(CAST(SUM(output_tokens) AS DOUBLE), 0), 2) AS io_ratio, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*') GROUP BY model

panels.title: Cost per Prompt Trend
panels.description: Hourly trend of cost per prompt vs average cost per API call. Red threshold line at $0.15.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN 1 END), 0), 4) AS cost_per_prompt, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN cost_usd END), 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name IN ('claude_code.api_request', 'claude_code.user_prompt') AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*' OR model IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cost by Model Trend
panels.description: Per-model cost rate from Prometheus. Stacked area showing cost per minute by model.

panels.title: Cost Distribution by Model
panels.description: Total cost share by model from Prometheus. Shows which model consumes most budget.

panels.title: Cost by Organization
panels.description: Cost attribution by organization for chargeback and budget allocation.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT COALESCE(organization_id, 'unknown') AS org, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 4) AS total_cost, COUNT(*) AS api_calls FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*') GROUP BY organization_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: User Cost Detail
panels.description: Total cost from Prometheus (stable), user details from Athena. Joined by user_id.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT user_id, COALESCE(MAX(user_name), user_id) AS user_display, CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS INTEGER) AS sessions, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS api_calls, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)) AS cache_read_tokens, ROUND(AVG(cost_usd), 6) AS avg_cost_per_call FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '.*') GROUP BY user_id
